title: Design a Network Diagram of a Distributed System
scenario: Create a network diagram that showcases the architecture of a distributed system. The diagram should include the different nodes, their connections, and a legend to explain the color coding. Include a brief description of the system's design and its scalability considerations.
constraints: Must have a maximum file size of 750KB

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the network diagram adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the network diagram easy to understand and navigate?
Does the network diagram accurately represent the distributed system's architecture?
Does the network diagram meet the specified file size constraint?
